messages.content: can you generate a professional keyboard and a output section below it using buttons, and also allow the actual keyboard to put information in the box or add to it, then have avriable are where i can add a list of words and webpages, that if the person types in that word it loads that webpage, also the keys need to glow when the physical keyboard is used, so thre is a feedback mechanic, a nice html with all the scripts please.

yes, i also need buttons drawn on over 50% of the screen, that is a visual input keyboard for celpphones, and should also display on pc, very professional, keep the current text box you have also, and conenct the two up.
it just asks me to type there is no buttons no keyboard layout, i want keyboard to be drawn on the screen with buttons i can click on as well.
there is no visible keyboard just the text box
ok i want you to draw buttons in the screen and assign all the keys of the keyboard to them and if i click on a button it needs to appear in a text box
you need to create each button seperately like as in a calculator program, but only assign keyboard stuff to it and make it bigger.
i see the text but no buttons

ok lets start again, i want a textbox 50% the screens height and width, then i want a variable area where i can add keywords, that if they match what is in the keyboard string it will load a corresponding webpage, You can call the program Travel Password. Add at least 10 lines of keywords choose any random words from teh dictionary, and add those same words as https://www.axlebox.com/word.html where you will replace word with the word you have chosen, any words in that list is checked and acted upon. Forget the visible keyboard thing, this is a new request.

when i type on the keyboard nothing happens, i have to click on the box first, i just want it to check the keyboard, also when i did type in something after the words was there nothing happened, you can add the word pmixer as the next line after holiday, also show the word in green when you are typing and there is no match, then red if there is a match then create a travel button, that you have to click on to go to the webpage
i see the travel button before i input any text, and when i do type in text it is not green, and does not work, use a different approach, and rewrite your code.

a new challenge, you will make it look professional use html5 and javascript if you have to, the project  will be centred, there will be 3 bars with three clickable circle buttons, that you can drag along the three bars, the total of the three bars is 100%, so you will put them all att 100/3 each, then if someone adjusts one bar, the other sliders move down or up, also put the percentages next to the bars.
you seem to be unable to create buttons for some reason, i see all the data but no sliders, also in the previous work, you have failed at producing buttons, lol. Oh well.
